plugins.name: nav
plugins.description: Keep any codebase navigable as it grows — audit (assess + feasibility), refactor (verbatim move + test gates), sync (navigation layer: file-top headers + bilingual codebase HTML, one grounding pass), doctor (full health pass), plan (spec → grounded plan). Language-agnostic. Built on Ousterhout's deep-module principles.

plugins.name: shape
plugins.description: Forward motion: give intent its form via real disposable instances (not descriptions), record decisions legibly, keep them current, and build them into running, verified code. Sibling to nav. Skills: mockup (render-to-decide), elicit (grounded grill → a thought), align (decide next + render the plan), reconcile (prune stale notes), build (drive the plan's In-progress to done); doctor deferred. Language-agnostic.
